steps.title: Use identical lines
steps.content: A system has infinitely many solutions only when both equations graph as the same line. Therefore, the second equation must have the same slope as the given line.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The given line is already in slope-intercept form. $$ y=\frac{3}{8}x+2 $$ The slope is $\frac{3}{8}$. The answer is C.
